title: Implementer must not consult TypeScript impl
description: The implementer SHALL NOT consult the TypeScript reference implementation.

title: Notifications must not receive a response
description: Notifications (messages with no id field) SHALL NOT receive a response.

title: ID may be string number or null
description: The id field MAY be a string

title: SDK should use monotonically incrementing IDs
description: The SDK SHOULD use monotonically incrementing integers for request IDs.

title: Responding peer must echo exact request ID
description: The responding peer SHALL echo the exact same id as the request.

title: SDK must maintain pending request map
description: The SDK SHALL maintain a map of pending outbound requests keyed by id.

title: SDK must resolve and remove pending on response
description: On receiving a response the SDK SHALL look up the id

title: Pending requests rejected on transport close
description: On transport close ALL pending requests SHALL be rejected with a TransportClosedError.

title: hello must be the first message
description: tesseron/hello SHALL be the first message sent after the connection is established.

title: Transport must provide reliable ordered delivery
description: Every transport binding SHALL provide reliable ordered delivery with no best-effort

title: Transport must deliver one envelope per message
description: Every transport binding SHALL deliver one JSON-RPC envelope per logical message with no batching and no visible fragmentation.

title: Transport must be symmetric duplex
description: Every transport binding SHALL be symmetric duplex allowing either side to send at any time.

title: Transport must be single connection per session
description: Every transport binding SHALL use a single connection per session; tesseron/hello opens and close terminates the session.

title: Transport must use local IPC threat model
description: Every transport binding SHALL operate within the same-process or same-user threat model as local IPC.

title: WS binary frames should be coerced to UTF-8
description: Binary WebSocket frames SHOULD be coerced to UTF-8 text and parsed as defensive tolerance.

title: App must advertise tesseron-gateway subprotocol
description: The app SHALL advertise the tesseron-gateway subprotocol in its WebSocket handshake response.

title: App must reject upgrades without correct subprotocol
description: The app SHALL reject WebSocket upgrade requests that do not carry the tesseron-gateway subprotocol.

title: App must bind to loopback only (WS)
description: The app SHALL bind its WebSocket server to loopback only (127.0.0.1 or ::1).

title: App must accept exactly one WS upgrade
description: The app SHALL accept exactly one WebSocket upgrade that carries tesseron-gateway and reject all others.

title: App must delete manifest on WS close
description: The app SHALL delete its manifest file when the WebSocket connection closes.

title: UDS app must create private temp directory
description: The app SHALL create a private directory with mode 0o700 under the system temp directory for UDS.

title: UDS app must bind socket inside private directory
description: The app SHALL bind the UDS socket inside the private temp directory.

title: UDS socket file should be chmod 0o600
description: The app SHOULD chmod 0o600 the UDS socket file after bind().

title: Manifest version field must be 2
description: The manifest version field SHALL be 2.

title: Discovery directories must be mode 0o700
description: The discovery directories (~/.tesseron/instances/ and ~/.tesseron/tabs/) SHALL be created with mode 0o700 if they do not exist.

title: Manifest files must be mode 0o600
description: Manifest files SHALL be written with mode 0o600.

title: Instance ID should use inst- prefix
description: The instanceId SHOULD be a random string prefixed with inst-.

title: App must delete manifest on graceful shutdown
description: The app SHALL delete its manifest file on graceful shutdown.

title: App should clean up on SIGINT and SIGTERM
description: On SIGINT and SIGTERM the app SHOULD clean up the manifest

title: protocolVersion must be 1.2.0 in hello
description: The protocolVersion field in tesseron/hello params SHALL be "1.2.0".

title: app.id must match regex
description: The app.id field SHALL match the pattern /^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$/.

title: Reserved app IDs must not be used
description: The reserved app IDs tesseron
status: and system SHALL NOT be used.

title: Handlers must trust welcome capabilities intersection
description: Handlers SHALL trust the capabilities intersection returned in welcome.capabilities.

title: SDK must update agent identity on claimed
description: On receiving tesseron/claimed the SDK SHALL update the cached WelcomeResult with the new agent identity.

title: SDK must clear claim code on claimed
description: On receiving tesseron/claimed the SDK SHALL clear the claimCode from the cached welcome.

title: SDK must overwrite capabilities on claimed
description: On receiving tesseron/claimed the SDK SHALL overwrite capabilities in the cached welcome with agentCapabilities if present.

title: Handlers must use agentCapabilities after claimed
description: Handlers SHALL use the agentCapabilities from tesseron/claimed as the authoritative capability set for ctx.agentCapabilities.

title: App must stash resumeToken alongside sessionId
description: On a fresh tesseron/hello the app SHALL stash the resumeToken alongside sessionId received in the welcome response.

title: App must persist new resumeToken after resume
description: The app SHALL persist the new resumeToken returned in the resume response overwriting the stored token.

title: SDK must re-subscribe resources after resume
description: The SDK SHALL re-subscribe to resources after a successful session resume.

title: Actions should use decorator with Pydantic models
description: Actions SHOULD be declared using decorators with Pydantic models in the Python SDK.

title: Invocation result must contain invocationId
description: The invocation result SHALL contain the invocationId field.

title: Invocation result must contain output field
description: The invocation result SHALL contain the output field.

title: SDK must validate input before handler
description: The SDK SHALL validate input against the action's Pydantic model or JSON Schema BEFORE invoking the handler.

title: SDK must return InputValidation error on failure
description: On input validation failure the SDK SHALL return error code -32004 InputValidation with validation issues in error.data.

title: Handler must not run on validation failure
description: On input validation failure the handler SHALL NOT run.

title: Strict output must be validated against schema
description: If the action is configured with strict_output=True the SDK SHALL validate the return value against the output schema.

title: Strict output failure returns HandlerError
description: On strict output validation failure the SDK SHALL return error code -32005 HandlerError with validation issues in error.data.

title: Dynamic action registration must trigger notification
description: Actions registered after the initial tesseron/hello SHALL trigger an actions/list_changed notification.

title: Action removal must trigger list_changed
description: Removing an action SHALL trigger an actions/list_changed notification with the updated list.

title: Progress percent should increase monotonically
description: The percent field in progress notifications SHOULD increase monotonically.

title: SDK must fire cancellation signal on cancel
description: On receiving actions/cancel the SDK SHALL fire the cancellation signal for the corresponding invocation.

title: Handler should check for cancellation and clean up
description: The handler SHOULD check for cancellation and clean up on receiving a cancellation signal.

title: SDK must return Cancelled error on cancel
description: On receiving actions/cancel the SDK SHALL return error code -32001 Cancelled.

title: SDK must abort invocation after timeoutMs
description: The SDK SHALL abort the invocation after timeoutMs milliseconds (default: 60000).

title: SDK must return Timeout error on timeout
description: On invocation timeout the SDK SHALL return error code -32002 Timeout.

title: SDK must race handler against timeout or cancel
description: The SDK SHALL race the handler against the timeout or cancel signal so the agent receives its error response immediately.

title: SDK should parse and validate sampling content
description: When a schema was provided in a sampling request the SDK SHOULD parse the content as JSON and validate it against the provided schema.

title: SDK should check sampling capability before calling
description: Before calling ctx.sample() the SDK SHOULD check ctx.agent_capabilities.sampling.

title: Handler must branch explicitly on elicit failure
description: For ctx.elicit() with structured data the handler SHALL branch explicitly or catch ElicitationNotAvailableError since there is no safe default.

title: Elicit schema top level must be object type
description: The elicitation schema top level SHALL be of type object.

title: Elicit schema properties must be primitive types
description: Each property in the elicitation schema SHALL be a primitive type (string

title: Elicit schema must not use oneOf anyOf allOf not
description: The elicitation schema SHALL NOT use oneOf
source: or not at the top level.

title: SDK must validate elicit schema before sending
description: The SDK SHALL validate the elicitation schema before sending and return -32602 InvalidParams if it violates MCP constraints.

title: SDK must send empty-object schema for confirm
description: For ctx.confirm() the SDK SHALL send the schema {"type":"object"

title: SDK should send permissive fallback elicit schema
description: When ctx.elicit() is called without an explicit jsonSchema the SDK SHOULD send the permissive fallback schema with a single string response property.

title: Callers should always provide elicit schema
description: For good UX callers SHOULD always provide a proper schema when calling ctx.elicit().

title: SDK must call cleanup on unsubscribe
description: On resources/unsubscribe the SDK SHALL call the cleanup function returned by the .subscribe() handler.

title: Dynamic resource registration must trigger notification
description: Resources registered or removed after tesseron/hello SHALL trigger a resources/list_changed notification.

title: All subscriptions must be cleaned up on transport close
description: On transport close ALL active subscriptions SHALL have their cleanup functions called.

title: Subscription map must be cleared on transport close
description: On transport close the subscription map SHALL be cleared.

title: Specific subscription cleanup must be called on unsubscribe
description: On resources/unsubscribe the specific subscription's cleanup function SHALL be called.

title: Subscription must be removed from map on unsubscribe
description: On resources/unsubscribe the subscription SHALL be removed from the map.

title: Handlers must trust capability intersection
description: The handler SHALL trust the capabilities intersection from welcome.capabilities.

title: Gateway may send agentCapabilities in claimed
description: The gateway MAY send updated agentCapabilities in the tesseron/claimed notification.

title: Capabilities must overwrite on claimed if present
description: When agentCapabilities is present in tesseron/claimed the SDK SHALL overwrite capabilities from the welcome with those values.

title: SDK must provide typed error classes
description: The SDK SHALL provide typed error classes: TesseronError

title: TesseronError must be mapped to JSON-RPC error
description: When a handler throws a TesseronError the SDK SHALL map it to a JSON-RPC error response with the corresponding code

title: Non-TesseronError must map to HandlerError
description: When a handler throws any other exception the SDK SHALL map it to -32005 HandlerError with the exception's message.

title: Incoming error must construct TesseronError
description: When an incoming JSON-RPC error response is received for a pending request the SDK SHALL construct a TesseronError with the error's code
status: and data and reject the pending request with it.

title: Pending requests rejected with TransportClosedError
description: On transport close ALL pending outbound requests SHALL be rejected with TransportClosedError.

title: In-flight invocations must have cancellation fired
description: On transport close ALL in-flight invocations SHALL have their cancellation signals fired.

title: Active subscriptions must be cleaned up on close
description: On transport close ALL active subscriptions SHALL have their cleanup functions called.

title: In-flight sample confirm elicit must reject on close
description: On transport close any sample()
status: or elicit() in flight SHALL reject with TransportClosedError.

title: SDK must not auto-reconnect silently
description: The SDK SHALL NOT auto-reconnect silently after a disconnect; calling connect() again yields a new sessionId and claimCode.

title: Apps must bind to loopback only (security)
description: Apps SHALL bind to loopback only (127.0.0.1 or ::1 for WS

title: Gateway must refuse non-loopback manifest URLs
description: The gateway SHALL refuse non-loopback URLs from manifests.

title: tesseron directory must be mode 0o700
description: The ~/.tesseron/ directory SHALL have mode 0o700.

title: Instance manifests must be mode 0o600 (security)
description: Instance manifests SHALL have mode 0o600.

title: Claim breadcrumb files must be mode 0o600
description: Claim breadcrumb files SHALL have mode 0o600.

title: Acceptance tests must all be satisfied
description: A correct implementation SHALL satisfy all acceptance test scenarios described in Section 18.

title: SDK must implement bidirectional JSON-RPC dispatcher
description: The SDK SHALL implement a bidirectional JSON-RPC dispatcher with on

title: Dispatcher must reject all pending on transport close
description: On transport close all pending outbound requests in the dispatcher SHALL be rejected via reject_all_pending.

title: Dispatcher must send MethodNotFound for unregistered
description: If no handler is registered for a method the dispatcher SHALL send -32601 MethodNotFound.

title: TesseronError in handler must produce error response
description: If the handler raises a TesseronError the dispatcher SHALL send an error response with its code

title: Other exception in handler must send InternalError
description: If the handler raises any other exception the dispatcher SHALL send -32603 InternalError with the exception's message.

title: Send failure must close transport
description: If send() fails due to a transport error the dispatcher SHALL close the transport so the peer sees a close and rejects its own pending requests.

title: Appendix API naming may be adjusted for Python
description: The implementer MAY adjust API naming conventions to be more Pythonic while preserving behavioral equivalence.

title: On resume failure SDK should clear and fall back
description: On resume failure the SDK SHOULD clear the stored credentials and fall back to a fresh tesseron/hello.

title: SDK should declare all capabilities as true
description: The SDK SHOULD declare all four capabilities (streaming

title: requiresConfirmation action must not be called uninvited
description: An action annotated with requiresConfirmation SHALL NOT be called without explicit user confirmation.

title: Agent must re-claim after reconnect
description: After a disconnect and reconnect the agent SHALL re-claim the session using the new claim code.

title: Pyodide transport must use browser-native WebSocket
description: The Pyodide transport SHALL use the browser-native WebSocket API via Pyodide FFI (js.WebSocket) instead of the websockets library.

title: Pyodide transport must clean up FFI proxies on close
description: The Pyodide transport SHALL destroy all create_proxy instances on close to prevent browser memory leaks.

title: Pyodide transport must bridge JS callbacks to asyncio
description: The Pyodide transport SHALL bridge event-driven JavaScript WebSocket callbacks (onopen onmessage onclose onerror) to asyncio primitives (Event Queue).

title: Pyodide transport must match client transport interface
description: The Pyodide transport SHALL implement the same public interface as WebSocketClientTransport (start send close messages wait_for_connection).

title: Pyodide transport must request tesseron-gateway subprotocol
description: The Pyodide transport SHALL pass tesseron-gateway as subprotocol to the browser WebSocket constructor.

title: Gateway must accept inbound WebSocket connections from apps
description: The gateway SHALL accept inbound WebSocket connections from Pyodide apps in addition to dialing desktop apps discovered via manifest.

title: Gateway must validate tesseron-gateway subprotocol on inbound connections
description: The gateway SHALL require the tesseron-gateway subprotocol on all inbound WebSocket connections.

title: Gateway must generate claim code in XXXX-XX format
description: The gateway SHALL generate claim codes using CSPRNG with format XXXX-XX from alphabet ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789.

title: Gateway must print claim code to stderr
description: The gateway SHALL print the claim code to stderr for out-of-band user handoff.

title: Gateway must enforce single-use claim codes
description: The gateway SHALL consume a claim code after successful claiming and reject reuse.

title: Gateway must respond to hello with welcome containing session and capabilities
description: The gateway SHALL respond to tesseron/hello with a welcome containing sessionId and protocolVersion and capabilities intersection and agent identity and claimCode and resumeToken.

title: Gateway must compute capabilities as intersection
description: The gateway SHALL compute capabilities as the intersection of app-declared and agent-provided capabilities.

title: Gateway must send claimed notification to app after claim
description: The gateway SHALL send tesseron/claimed notification to app containing agent identity and claimedAt and agentCapabilities.

title: Gateway must reject major protocol version mismatch
description: The gateway SHALL reject tesseron/hello with different major protocolVersion with -32000 ProtocolMismatch and close the connection.

title: Gateway must register actions as MCP tools with app_id__action_name
description: The gateway SHALL register every Tesseron action as an MCP tool named app_id__action_name using double-underscore separator.

title: Gateway must provide tesseron__claim_session MCP tool
description: The gateway SHALL provide a built-in tesseron__claim_session MCP tool accepting code as input.

title: Gateway must provide tesseron__list_actions MCP tool
description: The gateway SHALL provide a built-in tesseron__list_actions MCP tool listing all claimed sessions actions and resources.

title: Gateway must provide tesseron__list_pending_claims MCP tool
description: The gateway SHALL provide a built-in tesseron__list_pending_claims MCP tool listing pending claim codes.

title: Gateway must forward actions/invoke from agent to app
description: The gateway SHALL forward agent tool calls as actions/invoke JSON-RPC requests to the correct app session based on app_id routing.

title: Gateway must forward actions/progress to MCP as notifications/progress
description: The gateway SHALL forward actions/progress notifications from app to agent as MCP notifications/progress when progressToken was supplied.

title: Gateway must send actions/cancel on agent cancellation or timeout
description: The gateway SHALL send actions/cancel notification to app when agent cancels or when timeoutMs expires.

title: Gateway must enforce default 60000ms action timeout
description: The gateway SHALL abort invocations after timeoutMs milliseconds with default 60000 and return -32002 Timeout.

title: Gateway must bridge sampling/request to MCP sampling/createMessage
description: The gateway SHALL translate Tesseron sampling/request to MCP sampling/createMessage and return the LLM response.

title: Gateway must enforce maxSamplingDepth of 3
description: The gateway SHALL track sampling depth across recursive invocations and return -32008 SamplingDepthExceeded when depth exceeds 3.

title: Gateway must bridge elicitation/request to MCP elicitInput
description: The gateway SHALL translate Tesseron elicitation/request to MCP elicitInput and return the user response.

title: Gateway must forward log notifications as MCP sendLoggingMessage
description: The gateway SHALL forward app log notifications as MCP sendLoggingMessage with logger set to app_id.

title: Gateway must expose resources as MCP resources with tesseron URI
description: The gateway SHALL expose Tesseron resources as MCP resources with URI tesseron://app_id/resource_name.

title: Gateway must emit tools/list_changed on session connect claim or drop
description: The gateway SHALL emit MCP notifications/tools/list_changed when a session connects or is claimed or drops.

title: Gateway must emit resources/list_changed when resources change
description: The gateway SHALL emit MCP notifications/resources/list_changed when app resources are added or removed.

title: Gateway must retain zombie sessions for configurable TTL
description: The gateway SHALL retain disconnected sessions as zombies for a configurable TTL defaulting to 90 seconds for resume.

title: Gateway must validate resume with constant-time token comparison
description: The gateway SHALL validate tesseron/resume using constant-time comparison of resumeToken.

title: Gateway must rotate resumeToken on successful resume
description: The gateway SHALL return a new rotated resumeToken in the resume response.

title: Gateway must return -32011 ResumeFailed on invalid resume
description: The gateway SHALL return -32011 ResumeFailed for unknown session or bad token or TTL elapsed or cross-app resume or unclaimed zombie.

title: Gateway must reject action invocations from unclaimed sessions
description: The gateway SHALL return -32009 Unauthorized for action invocations on sessions that have not been claimed.

title: Gateway must reject wrong claim codes with -32009
description: The gateway SHALL return -32009 Unauthorized when an incorrect claim code is submitted.

title: Gateway must refuse non-loopback manifest URLs
description: The gateway SHALL refuse to connect to non-loopback URLs discovered in manifests.

title: Gateway must support multiple simultaneous app sessions
description: The gateway SHALL support multiple apps connecting simultaneously with separate app_id and claim code and session.

title: Gateway must route tool calls by app_id prefix
description: The gateway SHALL route MCP tool calls to the correct app session by parsing the app_id prefix from the tool name.

title: Gateway must implement session state machine
description: The gateway SHALL implement the session state machine: DISCONNECTED to HANDSHAKING to AWAITING_CLAIM to CLAIMED to CLOSED.

title: Gateway must reject all pending on transport close
description: The gateway SHALL reject all pending outbound requests with TransportClosedError when transport closes.

title: Gateway must fire cancellation signals on transport close
description: The gateway SHALL fire cancellation signals for all in-flight invocations when transport closes.

title: Gateway must clean up subscriptions on transport close
description: The gateway SHALL call cleanup functions for all active subscriptions when transport closes.

title: Gateway must use FastMCP as MCP server foundation
description: The gateway SHALL use FastMCP to implement the MCP server side eliminating the need for the BSL-licensed TypeScript gateway.

title: Gateway must watch manifest directory for desktop app discovery
description: The gateway SHALL watch ~/.tesseron/instances/ for manifest files to discover desktop apps.

title: Gateway must detect stale manifests via pid field
description: The gateway SHOULD detect stale manifests by checking if the pid process is still running.
